scripts.dev: npm run prisma:dev && dotenv -e .env.development -- tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.prisma:dev: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs dev && dotenv -e .env.development -- prisma generate
scripts.prisma:prod: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs prod && dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma generate
scripts.db:dev: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs dev && dotenv -e .env.development -- prisma db push
scripts.db:prod:migrate: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs prod && dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:prod:create-migration: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs prod && dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.studio:dev: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs dev && dotenv -e .env.development -- prisma studio
scripts.studio:prod: node scripts/write-prisma-schema.mjs prod && dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma studio
